name: autonoe-hsk
description: Autonoe: AI trading tribunal on HashKey Chain. Multi-agent LLM debate that executes on-chain trades via an agent wallet.

scripts.build:packages: bun run --filter '@autonoe/shared' build && bun run --filter '@autonoe/chain' build && (bun run --filter '@autonoe/wallet' build || true)
scripts.vercel-build: bun run build:packages && bun run --filter web build
